name: tradepilot-ai-scanner
description: Demo-only AI market scanner, research assistant, and paper-trading simulator.

scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix backend && npm install --prefix frontend
scripts.dev: npm run dev --prefix backend & npm run dev --prefix frontend
scripts.check: npm run check --prefix backend && npm run check --prefix frontend
scripts.build: npm run build --prefix backend && npm run build --prefix frontend
